title: TreeLens tree operation
description: One structural-channel op (wire-protocol.md §4). Computed by the adapter (compute_tree_diff), applied by the kernel (Mirror.apply_tree_diff). This is the COMPLETE vocabulary — there is no addGroup op; a group is an `add` with type="GROUP" and non-empty children.

oneOf.title: add
oneOf.description: Add the TOP node of a subtree; its children carry the whole new structure (descendants are not duplicated as separate adds).

oneOf.title: move
oneOf.description: Move a node by reference. toParent=null means top level.

oneOf.title: typeChange
oneOf.description: `from` MUST equal the node's current type in the mirror, else it is drift (kernel raises -> external rebuild).

oneOf.title: rebuild
oneOf.description: Degenerate op: full replacement. MUST be the only op in the array; `tree` is absorbed and stripped from the model-facing response.
